headline.description: Article headline / title as displayed at the top of the article
examples: White House reviews CFTC prediction-market rule as Trump backs federal control

date_published.description: Publication date in ISO 8601 format (from JSON-LD datePublished)

body.description: Plain-text article body (paragraphs joined with newlines)
examples: The White House's regulatory review office is examining a proposed Commodity Futures Trading Commission rule that would shape how prediction markets like Kalshi and Polymarket operate...

subheadline.description: Article subheadline / dek shown below the headline
examples: The proposal could shape how Kalshi, Polymarket, and other event-contract platforms operate in the U.S.

section.description: Site section the article belongs to (e.g. Policy, Markets, Business, Tech)

author_url.description: Relative URL to the author's profile page on coindesk.com

author_bio.description: Short biographical description of the author
examples: Sam Reynolds is a senior reporter based in Asia. Sam was part of the CoinDesk team that won the 2023 Gerald Loeb Award for the FTX coverage...

editor_name.description: Name of the editor credited on the article (may be empty)

date_modified.description: Last-modified date in ISO 8601 format (may be empty if not modified)

read_time.description: Estimated reading time as displayed on the page

hero_image_url.description: URL of the article's hero / lead image

hero_image_caption.description: Caption / credit displayed under the hero image

what_to_know.description: TL;DR bullet-point summary shown above the article body
examples: The White House's regulatory review office is examining a proposed CFTC rule on prediction markets.
The proposal could shape how Kalshi, Polymarket, and other event-contract platforms operate.
President Trump has backed federal control of these markets.

article_body_html.description: Article body with original HTML formatting preserved (paragraphs, links, etc.)
examples: The White House's regulatory review office is examining a proposed Commodity Futures Trading Commission rule...

tags.description: Human-readable topic tags shown on the article

article_id.description: Unique article identifier (UUID from CoinDesk's CMS)
